name: Chocolate Pecan Pie2
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Karo light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the first six ingredients until well blended.
2. Stir in the pecans.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
5. Cool.
